articles.title: SC ruling casts a tax shadow on merger share-swap deals
articles.description: A Supreme Court ruling impacts shareholders in company mergers. Those receiving new shares via share-swap may face taxes on gains, even without selling. This applies if their old shares were considered 'stock-in-trade'. The difference in value between old and new shares will be taxed as business income. This decision could lead to more tax disputes for investors and traders.
articles.fullDescription: A Supreme Court ruling impacts shareholders in company mergers. Those receiving new shares via share-swap may face taxes on gains, even without selling. This applies if their old shares were considered 'stock-in-trade'. The difference in value between old and new shares will be taxed as business income. This decision could lead to more tax disputes for investors and traders.

articles.title: From Delhi to Davos — A Spirit of Dialogue
articles.description: As the World Economic Forum's Annual Meeting convenes in Davos, the small Swiss town transforms into a global hub for discussing pressing economic, political, and technological issues. This year's theme, 'A Spirit of Dialogue,' emphasizes managing differences and keeping channels open in a contested world.
